implementationNotes: Draft PR #31 created — awaiting Terraform plan

items.label: Infrastructure Written — Terraform
items.docNote:
## Terraform Resources Created

### New Resources (cosmos.tf)
- **azurerm_cosmosdb_account.audit** → `cosmos-sampleapp-001` (Serverless, SQL API, RBAC-only — local_authentication_disabled=true)
- **azurerm_cosmosdb_sql_database.audit** → `AuditDB`
- **azurerm_cosmosdb_sql_container.audit_logs** → `AuditLogs` (partition key: /userId)
- **azurerm_cosmosdb_sql_role_assignment.func_audit_contributor** → Grants Function App MI 'Cosmos DB Built-in Data Contributor' (role ID 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002)

### Modified Resources
- **azurerm_function_app_flex_consumption.main** → Added `COSMOS_ENDPOINT` app setting
- **azurerm_api_management_api.sample** → Updated OpenAPI spec with POST /audit + GET /audit operations

### Terraform Outputs
- `cosmosdb_account_name` → Name of the Cosmos DB account
- `cosmosdb_endpoint` → Cosmos DB endpoint URL (used as COSMOS_ENDPOINT env var)

### API Spec (api-sample.openapi.yaml)
- GET /audit → operationId: getAuditLogs
- POST /audit → operationId: createAuditLog
- Added components/schemas: AuditLog, AuditLogCreate

### Hooks
- validate-infra.sh → Cosmos DB data-plane reachability check via curl (accepts 200/401)

### Plan Summary: 4 to add, 4 to change, 0 to destroy

items.label: Development Complete — Backend
items.docNote: Added fn-audit.ts with POST /audit (create event in Cosmos DB) and GET /audit (latest 50 events). Uses lazy CosmosClient singleton with DefaultAzureCredential, AuditLogCreateSchema validation at API boundary, and AuditLogSchema defence-in-depth on reads. No schema drift — reuses existing @branded/schemas audit types.

items.label: Development Complete — Frontend
items.docNote: Added /audit page with data table (loading/error/empty states), Audit nav link in NavBar, fire-and-forget POST /api/audit on demo login.
